value: I sincerely apologize for the frustration you're experiencing with your delivery. We take these concerns seriously, as the quality of our delivery service directly reflects on us. I'd like to help make this right. Could you please share your order number and a brief description of what happened (for example, was the package damaged, left in an unsafe location, or handled roughly)? With those details, I can escalate this to our delivery partner and ensure they address the issue properly.
